info.description:
LeadRouter API for lead routing operations.

## Authentication
All API endpoints require authentication using API keys.

### API Key Types
- **Public Keys** (`pk_...`): Read-only access
- **Private Keys** (`sk_...`): Full read/write access

### How to Authenticate
1. Log in to your account and create an API key
2. Click the "Authorize" button in Swagger UI
3. Enter your API key: `Bearer <your_api_key>`

All requests must include the `Authorization` header.

### Multi-tenant Access
API keys are scoped to your membership in a specific account.
To access multiple accounts, create separate API keys for each.
info.title: LeadRouter API

get.description: Lists campaigns for the account. Requires authentication.

post.description: Creates a new campaign. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns a campaign and its questionnaires. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Updates a campaign by slug. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns an active questionnaire in an active campaign. No authentication required.
get.summary: Get active questionnaire by campaign and slug

get.description: Lists all companies for the given account, ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new company within the account.

get.description: Exports leads scoped to a single company as CSV, using the same filtering semantics as scoped lead views.
Lists all orders for a company, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Creates a new order for a company. Orders start in paused status.

get.description: Returns a single order by ID.

patch.description: Updates an order's quantity and/or criteria. Only allowed when paused.

422.description: Validation error or order not paused

post.description: Transitions a paused order to active, making it eligible for lead distribution.
Transitions an active order to paused, stopping lead distribution.

get.description: Returns a single company by ID.

patch.description: Updates a company's name and/or status.

get.description: Lists distribution records for an account. Optionally filter by company_id and/or order_id.
Returns a single distribution record by ID with nested lead and order summaries.
Returns all landing pages for an account with resolved questionnaire and campaign slugs. No authentication required.

parameters.description: Optional site slug to scope results
parameters.name: site_slug

get.summary: List landing pages for an account

get.description: Returns a landing page by its slug with resolved questionnaire and campaign slugs. No authentication required.
Lists leads for an account with optional filters. Requires API key auth.

post.description: Creates a new lead in draft status. Returns a JWT token for subsequent operations.

get.description: Exports account-scoped leads as CSV using the same filters as the leads list endpoint.
Returns qualified leads that have no distribution records — i.e., leads that qualified but never matched to an order.

patch.description: Updates lead data. JSONB fields (metadata, data) are merged with existing values.

422.description: Validation error or lead already qualified

post.description: Runs qualification on a draft lead, distributes to a matching contractor, and returns matched company data.

422.description: Lead must be in draft status

post.description: Sends an SMS verification code to the lead's phone number via Telnyx Verify.
Verifies the SMS code submitted by the user and marks the lead's phone as verified.

get.description: Lists all questionnaires for an account. Requires authentication.

post.description: Creates a new questionnaire for an account. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns a questionnaire by its slug. Only active questionnaires are returned. No authentication required.

patch.description: Updates an existing questionnaire by slug. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns all site configurations for an account. No authentication required.
get.summary: List site configs for an account

get.description: Returns a site configuration by slug. No authentication required.
Lists all user memberships for the account with their company associations.

post.description: Invites a user by email. Creates the user if not found. Optionally associates with a company.
post.summary: Add a user to the account

delete.description: Removes a user's membership from the account.
delete.summary: Remove a member from the account

get.description: Returns a single account member by membership ID.

patch.description: Updates a member's role and/or profile fields (email, phone). All fields optional.

get.description: Returns the JSON Schema that defines the valid structure for questionnaire questions. Publicly cacheable.
